summary: Bumped `.printing-press.json` schema_version 0 → 1 and added `printer_name: "Rick van de Laar"`.
reason: Post-generation tooling (dogfood --write-acceptance and/or polish skill) wrote a skeleton manifest at schema_version 0 without printer_name, even though the original printing-press v4.2.0 manifest writer should produce schema_version 1 with printer_name populated. Hand-restored to satisfy the library's attribution guard.
validated_outcome: manifest.printer_name == 'Rick van de Laar'; manifest.schema_version == 1; library attribution guard satisfied.
